included.description: Truck-friendly MAPCO travel plaza at I-24 Exit 24 in Pleasant View. Redesigned store with eight tractor-trailer diesel bays with DEF, showers, renovated restrooms, deli/fast food, and roughly 58 free truck parking spaces on a paved, lighted lot.
24-hour QuikTrip travel center at I-24 Exit 11 (Rossview Rd). Diesel, QT Kitchens food, restrooms, pay-at-pump. Listed as a truck stop by Trucker Path; on-site truck parking not confirmed.
BP-branded travel center near I-24 Exit 35 (Whites Creek Pike). Diesel and gas, convenience store, and food (Dairy Queen, Subway, pizza). Truck parking/showers not confirmed.

held.hold_reason: Shell-branded 24-hr convenience store at 601 Hornbuckle Rd near I-24 Exit 11 (Hwy 76). Official store page describes it only as a convenience store; truck parking/overnight/diesel claim comes from a single aggregator and is not corroborated. Truck access unconfirmed.
Two names at the same address (1284 Jackson Felts Rd) near I-24 Exit 31; truck-parking claim from a single aggregator (Roadnow), no independent corroboration and no truck access confirmed.

held.business_name: I-24 Weigh Station (near KY line, Montgomery/Robertson)
held.hold_reason: Could not confirm a civic address or an official TDOT/THP listing for an I-24 commercial-vehicle scale near the KY state line. THP CVE list shows the nearest I-24 scale at MM 115 (Manchester, far out of corridor). Holding per instructions; overnight legality never assumed.

excluded.reason: across-the-KY-line — I-24 Exit 86, Oak Grove KY (11700 Fort Campbell Blvd); Kentucky is out of scope for this TN batch
across-the-KY-line — I-24 Exit 86, Oak Grove KY (12900 Fort Campbell Blvd); out of scope
across-the-KY-line — Oak Grove KY at I-24 Exit 86 cluster; out of scope
out-of-corridor — this TA Express is in Cookeville TN on I-40, not Clarksville/I-24
